details.queryString:
fetch dt.entity.service 
| fields tags 
| filter arrayContains(tags, concat("ENVIRONMENT:", "PRO")) 
| expand tags 
| filter startsWith(tags, "APP:") 
| fieldsAdd app = replaceString(tags, "APP:", "") 
| filter isNotNull(app) and app != "" 
| summarize count(), by: { app } 
| fields value = app 
| sort value asc 
| append [ data record(value = "ALL") ]
